description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3 Docker image. Define a single stage named test. Add a job called py.test in the test stage that runs pip3 install -r requirements.txt, then pip3 install -r requirements.test.txt, then echoes $LOCAL_CFG | base64 -d > env-local.cfg, and finally executes py.test. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
